scope: web-intel recursive task proposals for rlm-adk

tasks.title: Provider Release Delta Watchtower (Models, APIs, Pricing)
tasks.why: Updates are fragmented across docs/changelogs/blogs/status/pricing; recursive provider branches gather deltas in parallel and parent layer reconciles conflicts.

fold.batched: Per-provider retrieval plans and extraction of feature/date/price deltas
fold.single: Normalize into one release-delta ledger with confidence labels

bottlenecks.mitigation: Snapshot pages and hash sections for diffing
Stagger batches and cache unchanged sources

tasks.title: AI Regulation & Compliance Horizon Scanner
tasks.why: Regulatory evidence is jurisdiction-fragmented; recursive branches isolate each legal domain and allow deep interpretation only where ambiguity exists.

bottlenecks.mitigation: Prioritize primary law and regulator bulletins

tasks.title: Agent Framework Competitive Intelligence Matrix
tasks.why: Claims span docs, repos, issues, and third-party benchmarks; recursive branches validate each claim class before parent-level comparison.

fold.batched: Parallel claim extraction and evidence-type tagging

bottlenecks.mitigation: Require independent evidence per major claim

tasks.title: Dependency Vulnerability Cascade Map (ADK Stack)
tasks.why: Security data is scattered across advisories, CVEs, PoCs, and patch notes; recursion isolates dependency families and exploit paths.

fold.batched: Collect CVE/GHSA tuples and map to dependency graph nodes

tasks.title: RAG Vendor Cost-Latency-Quality Cartography
tasks.why: Pricing/performance evidence is distributed and inconsistent; recursive branches perform local normalization and parent assembles comparable views.

fold.batched: Extract prices, limits, SLA claims, and benchmark figures in parallel

bottlenecks.mitigation: Convert to common units ($/1M tokens, p95 latency)

tasks.title: Evidence Credibility Graph for Domain Sources
tasks.why: Credibility requires many weak signals; recursion scores provenance/citation/reputation features per source before fusion.

tasks.title: Benchmark Drift & Leaderboard Integrity Monitor
tasks.why: Benchmarks drift through dataset/version/method changes; recursion isolates each benchmark family and validates comparability.

tasks.title: Provider Outage & Incident Correlation Digest
tasks.why: Operational signals are noisy and multi-source; recursion gathers each signal class in parallel and keeps parent synthesis concise.

fold.batched: Parallel event extraction with timestamp normalization

bottlenecks.mitigation: Normalize to UTC while retaining source-local timestamps
Use provisional hypotheses with confidence decay

tasks.title: Policy/ToS Change Impact Radar
tasks.why: Subtle policy edits across many pages are hard to track monolithically; recursion enables doc-level diff branches and stable parent-level risk summaries.

fold.batched: Extract diff chunks and classify changed obligations/permissions

bottlenecks.mitigation: Periodic snapshots with structural HTML diffs

tasks.title: Vertical Opportunity Scanner (Evidence-Backed)
tasks.why: Opportunity detection relies on heterogeneous weak signals; recursive vertical branches maximize coverage while parent layer only ranks validated opportunities.
